headline: Assessing KeyCorp (KEY) Valuation After A Mixed Share Price Performance And 15% Undervaluation View
summary: KeyCorp stock triggered by recent performance KeyCorp (KEY) has drawn investor attention after a mixed stretch for the stock, with it down over the past month but up over the past 3 months and the past year. See our latest analysis for KeyCorp. At a share price of $21.33, KeyCorp’s recent pullback over the past month contrasts with a stronger trend, with its 1-year total shareholder return of 38.8% pointing to improving sentiment toward the stock’s risk and income profile. headline: If Rates Fall Further, Here’s What Happens to the KRE Regional Banking ETF
summary: The SPDR S&P Regional Banking ETF (NYSEARCA:KRE) has quietly become one of 2026’s better-performing financial trades, rising roughly 9% year to date and 28% over the past year to around $70 a share. The rally reflects what Q1 earnings just confirmed: regional bank net interest margins are finally widening as deposit costs roll over. For ... If Rates Fall Further, Here’s What Happens to the KRE Regional Banking ETF
